[+] Execution complete naturally in 44 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 44) ===
x0:    0 | x1: -1974 | x2:    0 | x3:  272 | x4: 1066 | x5:    0 | x6: -1819 | x7:  285 |

Branch Predictor Stats: 1/2 correct.
